regional_cost_note: Bricklayers in Auckland typically charge $125–$190/m² for single-skin brickwork, $115–$170/m² for blockwork, and $210–$420/m² for heritage restoration. Auckland rates are the highest in NZ, reflecting the city's cost of living and high demand. Brick is less common in NZ new builds but remains popular for retaining walls, paving, and heritage restoration.
